description: You are a Redmine Administrator acting as a Cost Estimator. Configure Redmine to track billable hours and work locations for time entries across all projects. Create a required Boolean custom field for time entries named 'Billable' with a default value of 'Yes'. Create a second custom field for time entries named 'Work Location' as a List with the values 'On-site', 'Remote', and 'Vendor Office' (default: 'On-site'). After configuring these fields, refer to the Issue ID and Subject provided in /home/ga/task_brief.txt to log a 4.0-hour time entry. The entry must include the comment 'Client strategy and requirements gathering', with 'Billable' set to 'Yes' and 'Work Location' set to 'Vendor Office'.
